src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Replaced the database seeding class with the main database class to reflect architectural changes.
Added null check in stream processing to prevent NullPointerExceptions when accessing fraction properties.
Added placeholder methods for new search functionalities required by the updated API specification.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Update test to call the renamed method findFractionNumeratorByUserFamilyName instead of the old findUserFractionNumeratorByFamilyName.
Update test to call the renamed method findUserFamilyNameByFractionDenominator instead of the old findFamilyNameByFractionDenominator.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.2.7 to 3.1.0 to support Java 17 and modern Spring features.
Change Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Remove spring-boot-starter-web dependency as the project migrated to WebFlux.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-webflux-ui to support WebFlux.
